title: Interface directions
question: Which visual direction should this surface take?
inputs: the current markup or screens the directions must replace

skills.name: First real item from the product

options.label: First direction
options.claim: One sentence stating this direction's philosophy about the surface.
pros: a real strength observed in the render
cons: a real cost observed in the render

options.label: Second direction
options.claim: A genuinely different philosophy — not a restyle of direction A.
pros: a real strength observed in the render
cons: a real cost observed in the render

options.label: Third direction
options.claim: A third incompatible philosophy so reacting beats imagining.
pros: a real strength observed in the render
cons: a real cost observed in the render

matrix.dimension: A dimension every direction is judged on

recommendation.reason: State why, grounded in the rendered comparison.

unresolved: anything the decision deliberately leaves open
